§6Motors§f

§aElectric motors — the moving parts inside almost every machine. Three tiers exist.§f


§6Standard Motor§f
The most common. Can be crafted at a crafting table, anvil, or arc welder. Uses red copper wire, iron plates, copper coils, and ring coils.

§6Desh Motor§f
Stronger motor for advanced machines and power armor. Made at crafting table or Tier 3 anvil from polymer, dense gold wire, desh, and a standard motor.

§6Bismuth Motor§f
The newest and most advanced. Uses bismuth, dense superconducting coils, cast steel plate, and HSS ingots.

§eTip§f: Standard motors are consumed by the dozens. Batch-craft them. Check JEI for exact recipes — they vary by crafting method.
